title: Press Council Amendment Rules 2016
text: 1585 GI/2016 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 229] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] ekpZ 31] 2016@pS=k 11] 1938 No. 229] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, MARCH 31, 2016/CHAITRA 11 , 1938 सू चना और ᮧसारण मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 30 माचᭅ, 2016 सा.का.िन. 377(अ).—कᱶᮤीय सरकार, ᮧेस पᳯरषद् अिधिनयम, 1978 (1978 का 37) क ᳱ धारा 25 कᳱ उपधारा (1) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शि᭍तयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, ᮧेस पᳯरषद् िनयम, 1979 का और संशोधन करने के िलए िन᭥निलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथाᭅत्:- 1. (1) इन िनयमᲂ का संिᭃ᭡त नाम ᮧेस पᳯरषद् (संशोधन) िनयम, 2016 है । (2) ये राजपᮢ मᱶ ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख को ᮧवृ᭜त हᲂगे । 2. ᮧेस पᳯरषद् िनयम, 1979 के िनयम 4 मᱶ,- (क) उपिनयम (1) मᱶ, खंड (iv) के ᭭ थान पर, िन᭥निलिखत रखा जाएगा:- “(iv) उपरो᭍त के अितᳯर᭍त, गैर सरकारी सद᭭य 10,000 ᱧपए ᮧितमाह कᳱ सीमा के अधीन रहते ᱟए 1,000 ᱧपए ᮧितᳰदन कᳱ बैठक फᳱस के हकदार हᲂगे और इसके अितᳯर᭍त इस शतᭅ के अधीन रहते ᱟए ᳰक ऐसे गैर सरकारी सद᭭य के᭠ ᮤीय सरकार ᳇ारा िव᭜त पोिषत ᳰकसी सं᭭था या संगठन मᱶ िनयोिजत नहᱭ ᳰकए जाएंगे और ऐसी सं᭭था या संगठन से वेतन ᮧा᭡त नहᱭ करᱶगे ।”; (ख) उपिनयम (2) के ᭭ थान पर, िन᭥निलिखत रखा जाएगा:- “(2) पᳯरषद् के ऐसे सद᭭य जो ᭭ थानीय ᱨप से पᳯरषद् के कायᭅ मᱶ उपि᭭थत होते हᱹ 8,00 ᱧपए ᮧितᳰदन कᳱ सीमा के अधीन रहते ᱟए वा᭭तिवक आधार पर ᮧवहण भ᭜तᲂ के हकदार हᲂगे ।”। [फा. सं. एम. 22011/4/2013-ᮧेस] िमिहर कुमार ᳲसह, संयु᭍त सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] ᳯट᭡पण:- मूल िनयम भारत के राजपᮢ, भाग 2, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) मᱶ सा. का.िन. सं. 286, तारीख 8 फरवरी, 1979 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे और त᭜प᭫चात् सा.का.िन. 94 0, तारीख 20 नवंबर, 1982, सा.का.िन. 622(अ), तारीख 16 मई, 1988 और सा.का.िन. 37(अ), तारीख 27 जनवरी, 1997 ᳇ारा संशोिधत ᳰकए गए थे । MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th March, 2016 G.S.R. 377(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Press Council Act, 1978 (37 of 1978), the Central Government after consulting the Press Council of India, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Press Council Rules, 1979, namely: - 1. (1) These rules may be called the Press Council (Amendment) Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Press Council Rules, 1979, in rule 4,- (a) in sub-rule (1), for clause (iv), the following shall be substituted:- “(iv) In addition to the above, the non-official members shall be entitled to a sitting fee of Rs. 1,000/- per day, subject to a ceiling of Rs. 10,000/- per month and further subject to the condition that such non-official members shall not be employed in any institution or organisation funded by the Government and drawing salary from such institution or organisation.”; (b) for sub-rule (2), the following shall be substituted,- “(2) Those members of the Council who attend the work of the Council locally, shall be entitled to conveyance charges on actual basis subject to a ceiling of Rs. 800/- per day.”. [F. No. M-22011/4/2013-Press] MIHIR KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 286, dated the 8th February, 1979 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R. 940, dated the 20th November, 1982, G.S.R. 622(E), dated the 16th May, 1988 and G.S.R. 37(E), dated the 27th January, 1997. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
